untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) EEDB pattern recognition — not available as a technical indicator in the allowed list; (2) gap size comparison between bear and bull market regimes — gap measurement not available; (3) precise breakout price identification and placement 'slightly below' it — requires candlestick pattern recognition beyond available indicators. The signal is inherently pattern-based and cannot be fully operationalized with only OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, and pivot indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted a proxy entry (close > prev_close to detect upside breakout) and exit based on mean reversion below SMA_20, with 35-day hold window derived from the stated '10% of patterns reach ultimate high in just over one month (35 days)'. However, the core EEDB pattern identification and gap-size regime differentiation cannot be translated to the allowed indicator set. Manual chart review would be required to identify valid EEDB formations before executing this rule.
